result.markdown: --- title: "Spatial Distribution of Diabetes Patients and Age Group Composition in Chattogram City Corporation" format: html: code-fold: true code-tools: true execute: warning: false message: false --- ## City Corporation This section visualizes the distribution of diabetes patients across selected thanas of Chattogram City Corporation. The map uses GADM level-3 administrative boundary data from a GeoPackage file and joins it with manually entered thana-level diabetes percentage data. The spatial boundary file path is loaded from the `.env` file using the `GPKG_PATH` environment variable. This keeps the source code cleaner and avoids hard-coding the data path directly inside the analysis script. The workflow follows these main steps: 1. Load the required Python libraries. 2. Read the GeoPackage boundary file using `geopandas`. 3. Create a tabular dataset containing diabetes percentages by thana. 4. Clean and standardize thana names for reliable joining. 5. Join the diabetes dataset with the spatial boundary dataset. 6. Classify diabetes percentages into fixed percentage intervals. 7. Apply a red choropleth color palette, starting from a darker red shade. 8. Save the final map as a PDF under the `report/` directory. 9. Preview the generated PDF directly inside the rendered document. The diabetes percentages are classified into the following groups: - `1–3%` - `3–5%` - `5–7%` - `7–9%` - `9–11%` - `11–13%` - `>13%` A custom red color palette is used for the choropleth map. Unlike very pale choropleth palettes, the first class begins with a visibly darker red shade so that even low-percentage areas remain clearly visible on the map. ::: {#511381cb .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} # ============================ # Load Required Libraries # ============================ import os import re import base64 import geopandas as gpd import pandas as pd import seaborn as sns from dotenv import load_dotenv from matplotlib.figure import Figure from matplotlib.backends.backend_agg import FigureCanvasAgg as FigureCanvas from matplotlib.patches import Patch from IPython.display import HTML, display # ============================ # Load Environment Variable # ============================ load_dotenv() GPKG_PATH = os.getenv("GPKG_PATH") if GPKG_PATH is None: raise ValueError("GPKG_PATH not found in .env file.") if not os.path.exists(GPKG_PATH): raise FileNotFoundError(f"GPKG file not found at: {GPKG_PATH}") # ============================ # Create Output Directory # ============================ REPORT_DIR = "report" os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True) # ============================ # PDF Preview Helper # ============================ def preview_pdf(pdf_path, height=950): """ Embed a generated PDF directly into the Quarto HTML output. This avoids relative-path preview errors such as 'Not Found' when the PDF exists but the rendered HTML cannot resolve the path. """ with open(pdf_path, "rb") as pdf_file: encoded_pdf = base64.b64encode(pdf_file.read()).decode("utf-8") display( HTML( f""" """ ) ) # ============================ # Helper Functions # ============================ def clean_key(x): """ Standardize text for joining: lowercase + remove all non-letter characters. """ if pd.isna(x): return None return re.sub(r"[^a-z]", "", str(x).lower()) def strip_admin_suffix(x): """ Remove common administrative suffixes from place names. """ if pd.isna(x): return None pattern = r"\s+(Sadar Upazila|Sadar|Upazila|Thana|PS)$" return re.sub(pattern, "", str(x), flags=re.IGNORECASE).strip() # ============================ # Load Spatial Data # ============================ bd_adm3 = gpd.read_file(GPKG_PATH) # ============================ # Input Data: Diabetes Percentage # ============================ diab_city = pd.DataFrame( { "thana": [ "Pahartali", "Halishahar", "Khulshi", "Chandgaon", "Kotwali", "Double Mooring", "Panchlaish", "Bayejid Bostami", "Bakalia", "Chittagong Port", "Patenga", ], "percent": [ 24.07, 12.82, 10.34, 9.59, 9.19, 8.63, 7.94, 7.80, 4.45, 3.31, 1.86, ], } ) # ============================ # Manual Name Harmonization # ============================ name_fixes = { "Pahartali": "Pahartali", "Halishahar": "Halishahar", "Khulshi": "Khulshi", "Chandgaon": "Chandgaon", "Kotwali": "Kotwali", "Double Mooring": "Double Mooring", "Panchlaish": "Panchlaish", "Bayejid Bostami": "Bayejid Bostami", "Bayezid": "Bayejid Bostami", "Bayezid Bostami": "Bayejid Bostami", "Chittagong Port": "Chittagong Port", "Bakalia": "Bakalia", "Patenga": "Patenga", } # ============================ # Prepare Spatial Dataset # ============================ bd_ctg = bd_adm3.loc[ bd_adm3["NAME_2"].isin(["Chattogram", "Chittagong"]) ].copy() bd_ctg["thana_gadm"] = bd_ctg["NAME_3"] bd_ctg["name3_simple"] = bd_ctg["NAME_3"].apply(strip_admin_suffix) bd_ctg["name3_fixed"] = bd_ctg["name3_simple"].replace(name_fixes) bd_ctg["join_key_gadm"] = bd_ctg["name3_fixed"].apply(clean_key) # ============================ # Prepare Diabetes Dataset # ============================ diab_join = diab_city.copy() diab_join["thana_fixed"] = diab_join["thana"].replace(name_fixes) diab_join["join_key_diab"] = diab_join["thana_fixed"].apply(clean_key) # ============================ # Join Spatial and Diabetes Data # ============================ map_dat = bd_ctg.merge( diab_join, how="left", left_on="join_key_gadm", right_on="join_key_diab", ) # ============================ # Join Quality Check # ============================ missing_thanas = diab_join.loc[ ~diab_join["join_key_diab"].isin(map_dat["join_key_gadm"]) ].copy() if len(missing_thanas) > 0: unmatched = ", ".join(missing_thanas["thana"].unique()) raise ValueError(f"Unmatched thanas detected: {unmatched}") # ============================ # Classification Setup # ============================ vals = map_dat["percent"].dropna() if len(vals) == 0: raise ValueError("No percentage values available for binning.") max_percent = vals.max() breaks = [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, max_percent] diabetes_labels = [ "1–3%", "3–5%", "5–7%", "7–9%", "9–11%", "11–13%", ">13%", ] # ============================ # Apply Classification # ============================ map_dat["pct_bin"] = pd.cut( map_dat["percent"], bins=breaks, labels=diabetes_labels, right=True, include_lowest=True, ) map_dat["label_name"] = map_dat["name3_fixed"] map_dat_plot = map_dat.loc[ map_dat["percent"].notna() ].copy() map_dat_plot["pct_bin"] = pd.Categorical( map_dat_plot["pct_bin"], categories=diabetes_labels, ordered=True, ) # ============================ # Diabetes Choropleth Palette # ============================ red_band = [ "#FCBBA1", "#FC9272", "#FB6A4A", "#EF3B2C", "#CB181D", "#A50F15", "#67000D", ] diabetes_palette = sns.color_palette( red_band, n_colors=len(diabetes_labels), ).as_hex() diabetes_color_map = dict(zip(diabetes_labels, diabetes_palette)) map_dat_plot["fill_color"] = map_dat_plot["pct_bin"].map(diabetes_color_map) outline_col = "#737373" outline_lwd = 0.50 # ============================ # Render Map # ============================ fig = Figure(figsize=(15, 17)) canvas = FigureCanvas(fig) ax = fig.subplots() fig.subplots_adjust( left=0.02, right=0.72, top=0.98, bottom=0.02, ) map_dat_plot.plot( ax=ax, color=map_dat_plot["fill_color"].tolist(), edgecolor=outline_col, linewidth=outline_lwd, zorder=1, ) # ============================ # Add Thana Labels # ============================ for _, row in map_dat_plot.iterrows(): point = row.geometry.representative_point() ax.text( point.x, point.y, row["label_name"], fontsize=16, color="#1A1A1A", ha="center", va="center", bbox={ "facecolor": "white", "alpha": 0.76, "edgecolor": "none", "boxstyle": "round,pad=0.24", }, zorder=5, ) # ============================ # Diabetes Legend # ============================ diabetes_legend_handles = [ Patch( facecolor=diabetes_color_map[label], edgecolor=outline_col, label=label, ) for label in diabetes_labels ] diabetes_legend = ax.legend( handles=diabetes_legend_handles, title="Distribution of\nDiabetes Patients (%)", loc="center left", bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 0.50), frameon=True, fontsize=13, title_fontsize=15, borderaxespad=0.0, ) diabetes_legend.get_frame().set_facecolor("white") diabetes_legend.get_frame().set_alpha(0.96) # ============================ # Save PDF and Preview # ============================ ax.set_title("") ax.set_axis_off() ax.set_aspect("equal") diabetes_map_pdf = os.path.join( REPORT_DIR, "chattogram_city_diabetes_choropleth_map.pdf", ) fig.savefig( diabetes_map_pdf, format="pdf", bbox_inches="tight", pad_inches=0.25, ) preview_pdf( diabetes_map_pdf, height=950, ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html} ``` ::: ::: Figure: Spatial distribution of diabetes patients across selected thanas of Chattogram City Corporation. The choropleth colors represent diabetes patient percentage classes, with darker red indicating higher percentages. ## City Corporation with Age Group Composition This section extends the diabetes choropleth map by adding miniature pie charts on top of each thana. The base map still shows diabetes percentage classes, while the pie charts show the age-group distribution within each thana. Each miniature pie chart represents two age groups: * `<=30 years` * `>30 years` The map therefore combines two layers of information: 1. Background choropleth layer: diabetes patient percentage by thana. 2. Overlay pie-chart layer: age-group distribution by thana. The pie charts are placed at representative points inside the thana polygons. The `<=30 years` group is shown in yellow-orange, while the `>30 years` group is shown in deep blue. These colors are intentionally distinct from the red choropleth background. ::: {#34127862 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} # ============================ # Load Required Libraries # ============================ import os import re import base64 import numpy as np import geopandas as gpd import pandas as pd import seaborn as sns import matplotlib.patheffects as path_effects from dotenv import load_dotenv from matplotlib.figure import Figure from matplotlib.backends.backend_agg import FigureCanvasAgg as FigureCanvas from matplotlib.patches import Patch, Wedge, Circle from IPython.display import HTML, display # ============================ # Load Environment Variable # ============================ load_dotenv() GPKG_PATH = os.getenv("GPKG_PATH") if GPKG_PATH is None: raise ValueError("GPKG_PATH not found in .env file.") if not os.path.exists(GPKG_PATH): raise FileNotFoundError(f"GPKG file not found at: {GPKG_PATH}") # ============================ # Create Output Directory # ============================ REPORT_DIR = "report" os.makedirs(REPORT_DIR, exist_ok=True) # ============================ # PDF Preview Helper # ============================ def preview_pdf(pdf_path, height=1100): """ Embed a generated PDF directly into the Quarto HTML output. This avoids relative-path preview errors such as 'Not Found' when the PDF exists but the rendered HTML cannot resolve the path. """ with open(pdf_path, "rb") as pdf_file: encoded_pdf = base64.b64encode(pdf_file.read()).decode("utf-8") display( HTML( f""" """ ) ) # ============================ # Helper Functions # ============================ def clean_key(x): """ Standardize text for joining: lowercase + remove all non-letter characters. """ if pd.isna(x): return None return re.sub(r"[^a-z]", "", str(x).lower()) def strip_admin_suffix(x): """ Remove common administrative suffixes from place names. """ if pd.isna(x): return None pattern = r"\s+(Sadar Upazila|Sadar|Upazila|Thana|PS)$" return re.sub(pattern, "", str(x), flags=re.IGNORECASE).strip() def draw_pie_with_percentages( ax, x, y, values, colors, text_colors, radius, label_fontsize=19, edgecolor="white", linewidth=1.20, ): """ Draw a miniature pie chart at a map coordinate and place percentage labels inside each slice. """ total = sum(values) if total <= 0: return start_angle = 90 for value, color, text_color in zip(values, colors, text_colors): angle = 360 * value / total end_angle = start_angle + angle wedge = Wedge( center=(x, y), r=radius, theta1=start_angle, theta2=end_angle, facecolor=color, edgecolor=edgecolor, linewidth=linewidth, zorder=6, ) ax.add_patch(wedge) mid_angle = (start_angle + end_angle) / 2 mid_angle_rad = np.deg2rad(mid_angle) label_x = x + radius * 0.58 * np.cos(mid_angle_rad) label_y = y + radius * 0.58 * np.sin(mid_angle_rad) label_text = f"{value:.1f}%" stroke_color = "white" if text_color == "black" else "black" ax.text( label_x, label_y, label_text, fontsize=label_fontsize, color=text_color, ha="center", va="center", weight="bold", zorder=9, path_effects=[ path_effects.withStroke( linewidth=3.0, foreground=stroke_color, ) ], ) start_angle = end_angle outline = Circle( xy=(x, y), radius=radius, facecolor="none", edgecolor="#222222", linewidth=1.20, zorder=7, ) ax.add_patch(outline) # ============================ # Load Spatial Data # ============================ bd_adm3 = gpd.read_file(GPKG_PATH) # ============================ # Input Data: Diabetes Percentage # ============================ diab_city = pd.DataFrame( { "thana": [ "Pahartali", "Halishahar", "Khulshi", "Chandgaon", "Kotwali", "Double Mooring", "Panchlaish", "Bayejid Bostami", "Bakalia", "Chittagong Port", "Patenga", ], "percent": [ 24.07, 12.82, 10.34, 9.59, 9.19, 8.63, 7.94, 7.80, 4.45, 3.31, 1.86, ], } ) # ============================ # Input Data: Age Group Percentages # ============================ age_city = pd.DataFrame( { "thana": [ "Bakalia", "Bayejid Bostami", "Chandgaon", "Chittagong Port", "Double Mooring", "Halishahar", "Khulshi", "Kotwali", "Pahartali", "Panchlaish", "Patenga", ], "age_le_30": [ 9.57, 9.60, 8.50, 8.44, 7.74, 7.97, 10.73, 6.71, 10.10, 6.94, 9.88, ], "age_gt_30": [ 90.43, 90.40, 91.50, 91.56, 92.26, 92.03, 89.27, 93.29, 89.90, 93.06, 90.12, ], } ) # ============================ # Manual Name Harmonization # ============================ name_fixes = { "Pahartali": "Pahartali", "Halishahar": "Halishahar", "Khulshi": "Khulshi", "Chandgaon": "Chandgaon", "Kotwali": "Kotwali", "Double Mooring": "Double Mooring", "Panchlaish": "Panchlaish", "Bayejid Bostami": "Bayejid Bostami", "Bayezid": "Bayejid Bostami", "Bayezid Bostami": "Bayejid Bostami", "Chittagong Port": "Chittagong Port", "Bakalia": "Bakalia", "Patenga": "Patenga", } # ============================ # Prepare Spatial Dataset # ============================ bd_ctg = bd_adm3.loc[ bd_adm3["NAME_2"].isin(["Chattogram", "Chittagong"]) ].copy() bd_ctg["thana_gadm"] = bd_ctg["NAME_3"] bd_ctg["name3_simple"] = bd_ctg["NAME_3"].apply(strip_admin_suffix) bd_ctg["name3_fixed"] = bd_ctg["name3_simple"].replace(name_fixes) bd_ctg["join_key_gadm"] = bd_ctg["name3_fixed"].apply(clean_key) # ============================ # Prepare Diabetes Dataset # ============================ diab_join = diab_city.copy() diab_join["thana_fixed"] = diab_join["thana"].replace(name_fixes) diab_join["join_key_diab"] = diab_join["thana_fixed"].apply(clean_key) # ============================ # Prepare Age Group Dataset # ============================ age_join = age_city.copy() age_join["thana_fixed"] = age_join["thana"].replace(name_fixes) age_join["join_key_age"] = age_join["thana_fixed"].apply(clean_key) # ============================ # Join Spatial, Diabetes, and Age Data # ============================ map_dat = bd_ctg.merge( diab_join, how="left", left_on="join_key_gadm", right_on="join_key_diab", ) map_dat = map_dat.merge( age_join[["join_key_age", "age_le_30", "age_gt_30"]], how="left", left_on="join_key_gadm", right_on="join_key_age", ) # ============================ # Join Quality Checks # ============================ missing_diabetes_thanas = diab_join.loc[ ~diab_join["join_key_diab"].isin(map_dat["join_key_gadm"]) ].copy() if len(missing_diabetes_thanas) > 0: unmatched = ", ".join(missing_diabetes_thanas["thana"].unique()) raise ValueError(f"Unmatched diabetes thanas detected: {unmatched}") missing_age_thanas = age_join.loc[ ~age_join["join_key_age"].isin(map_dat["join_key_gadm"]) ].copy() if len(missing_age_thanas) > 0: unmatched = ", ".join(missing_age_thanas["thana"].unique()) raise ValueError(f"Unmatched age-group thanas detected: {unmatched}") # ============================ # Classification Setup # ============================ vals = map_dat["percent"].dropna() if len(vals) == 0: raise ValueError("No percentage values available for binning.") max_percent = vals.max() breaks = [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, max_percent] diabetes_labels = [ "1–3%", "3–5%", "5–7%", "7–9%", "9–11%", "11–13%", ">13%", ] # ============================ # Apply Diabetes Classification # ============================ map_dat["pct_bin"] = pd.cut( map_dat["percent"], bins=breaks, labels=diabetes_labels, right=True, include_lowest=True, ) map_dat["label_name"] = map_dat["name3_fixed"] map_dat_plot = map_dat.loc[ map_dat["percent"].notna() ].copy() map_dat_plot["pct_bin"] = pd.Categorical( map_dat_plot["pct_bin"], categories=diabetes_labels, ordered=True, ) # ============================ # Diabetes Choropleth Palette # ============================ red_band = [ "#FCBBA1", "#FC9272", "#FB6A4A", "#EF3B2C", "#CB181D", "#A50F15", "#67000D", ] diabetes_palette = sns.color_palette( red_band, n_colors=len(diabetes_labels), ).as_hex() diabetes_color_map = dict(zip(diabetes_labels, diabetes_palette)) map_dat_plot["fill_color"] = map_dat_plot["pct_bin"].map(diabetes_color_map) outline_col = "#737373" outline_lwd = 0.65 # ============================ # Age Group Pie Chart Palette # ============================ age_labels = ["<=30", ">30"] age_colors = sns.color_palette( ["#FFD166", "#118AB2"], n_colors=len(age_labels), ).as_hex() age_color_map = dict(zip(age_labels, age_colors)) age_text_color_map = { "<=30": "black", ">30": "white", } # ============================ # Render Map # ============================ fig = Figure(figsize=(28, 34)) canvas = FigureCanvas(fig) ax = fig.subplots() fig.subplots_adjust( left=0.02, right=0.72, top=0.985, bottom=0.015, ) map_dat_plot.plot( ax=ax, color=map_dat_plot["fill_color"].tolist(), edgecolor=outline_col, linewidth=outline_lwd, zorder=1, ) # ============================ # Pie Chart Size # ============================ minx, miny, maxx, maxy = map_dat_plot.total_bounds map_width = maxx - minx map_height = maxy - miny pie_radius = min(map_width, map_height) * 0.070 # ============================ # Draw Age Group Pie Charts # ============================ for _, row in map_dat_plot.iterrows(): if pd.isna(row["age_le_30"]) or pd.isna(row["age_gt_30"]): continue point = row.geometry.representative_point() draw_pie_with_percentages( ax=ax, x=point.x, y=point.y, values=[ row["age_le_30"], row["age_gt_30"], ], colors=[ age_color_map["<=30"], age_color_map[">30"], ], text_colors=[ age_text_color_map["<=30"], age_text_color_map[">30"], ], radius=pie_radius, label_fontsize=19, ) # ============================ # Add Thana Labels # ============================ for _, row in map_dat_plot.iterrows(): point = row.geometry.representative_point() ax.text( point.x, point.y - pie_radius * 1.68, row["label_name"], fontsize=24, color="#1A1A1A", ha="center", va="top", bbox={ "facecolor": "white", "alpha": 0.80, "edgecolor": "none", "boxstyle": "round,pad=0.25", }, zorder=10, ) # ============================ # Diabetes Legend # ============================ diabetes_legend_handles = [ Patch( facecolor=diabetes_color_map[label], edgecolor=outline_col, label=label, ) for label in diabetes_labels ] diabetes_legend = ax.legend( handles=diabetes_legend_handles, title="Distribution of\nDiabetes Patients (%)", loc="center left", bbox_to_anchor=(0.9, 0.5), frameon=True, fontsize=20, title_fontsize=22, borderaxespad=0.0, ) diabetes_legend.get_frame().set_facecolor("white") diabetes_legend.get_frame().set_alpha(0.96) ax.add_artist(diabetes_legend) # ============================ # Age Group Legend # ============================ age_legend_handles = [ Patch( facecolor=age_color_map["<=30"], edgecolor="#333333", label="<=30 years", ), Patch( facecolor=age_color_map[">30"], edgecolor="#333333", label=">30 years", ), ] age_legend = ax.legend( handles=age_legend_handles, title="Age Group", loc="center left", bbox_to_anchor=(0.95, 0.40), frameon=True, fontsize=20, title_fontsize=22, borderaxespad=0.0, ) age_legend.get_frame().set_facecolor("white") age_legend.get_frame().set_alpha(0.96) # ============================ # Save PDF and Preview # ============================ ax.set_title("") ax.set_axis_off() ax.set_aspect("equal") age_group_map_pdf = os.path.join( REPORT_DIR, "chattogram_city_diabetes_age_group_pie_map.pdf", ) fig.savefig( age_group_map_pdf, format="pdf", bbox_inches="tight", pad_inches=0.25, ) preview_pdf( age_group_map_pdf, height=1150, ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ```{=html} ``` ::: ::: Figure: Diabetes patient distribution and age-group composition across selected thanas of Chattogram City Corporation. The red choropleth background shows diabetes patient percentage classes, while miniature pie charts show the proportion of patients aged `<=30 years` and `>30 years` in each thana.
